pipelines.description: All metadata as text → LLM selects 3 outfits. No visual retrieval.
FashionCLIP text→image retrieval, greedy diverse selection. No LLM.
FashionCLIP retrieves top-k per category. LLM selects from text metadata of candidates.
FashionCLIP retrieves top-k per category. Vision LLM selects from candidate images.
Metadata pre-filter by season + occasion keywords, then LLM selects from filtered set.
Same metadata pre-filter as P5, but vision LLM sees filtered items' images. Tests: do images help over text after good semantic filtering?
